title: Chattahoochee
why_this_song: Chattahoochee by Alan Jackson (1993) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 12 times; first heard in: "Talkin' 'bout cars and dreamin 'bout women"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "We got a litte crazy but we never got caught"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "Never had a plan just a-livin' for the minute"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "But I learned how to swim and I learned who I was"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "Yeah way down yonder on the Chattahoochee"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Yeah way down yonder on the Chattahoochee
It gets hotter than a hoochie coochie
We laid rubber on the Georgia asphalt
We got a litte crazy but we never got caught
I was willin' but she wasn't ready
So I settled for a burger and a grape snow cone
Dropped her off early but I didn't go home
Down by the river on a Friday night

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "bout" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "bout" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:

excerpts.text: Yeah way down yonder on the Chattahoochee
I was willin' but she wasn't ready
We laid rubber on the Georgia asphalt

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Chattahoochee" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Chattahoochee" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Chattahoochee", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Chattahoochee", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Chattahoochee" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Chattahoochee" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
